work_unit: full-project deep audit (server, social-scraper, generate-content, mail_push, calibration, vision_calibrate, dl_images, analyze)
situation: audit-cycle-state was cycle-complete after wechat-main audit-2026-07-06-022 all 22 fixes merged. Triggered new full audit round. Selected wanxia-edit as next unaudited project with real business code (17 code files, sunset prediction content generation + social scraping + mail push). Skipped autonomous-engine (overlaps with already-audited autonomous-studio hooks), moni-master (DO NOT exclude), wanxia-posts (pure data), engine-skills-extracted (config/archive).
action: Deep-read 15 source files across server entry, social scraper (Weibo+XHS via Playwright), content generation pipeline, mail push, calibration, vision analysis, image download scripts. Identified 15 findings (5H/7M/2L/1I). Wrote audit report audit-2026-07-06-023.md. Registered 14 derived_fixes in audit-cycle-state.json as pending. 1 structural debt (SD-007 copy-generator hardcoded copy) noted but not dispatched.
outcome_evidence: audit-2026-07-06-023.md written (15 findings documented with file:line references); audit-cycle-state.json updated to status=fix-in-progress with 14 derived_fixes pending; history entry appended for audit-2026-07-06-023.
next_suggestion: Dispatch H-001+H-002 combined fix: decouple generate-content.js:95 and poetic_intro.py:20 from /opt/personal-assistant/.env — switch to local .env or process.env.DEEPSEEK_API_KEY with stat mode check
Dispatch H-003+L-003 combined fix: replace hardcoded /opt/wanxia/ paths in dl_images.mjs, analyze.mjs, validate_new.js with relative/env-based resolution
Dispatch H-004: add SOCIAL_PROXY_URL scheme/IP validation in social-scraper.js before Playwright context creation

audit_findings.finding: Hardcoded readFileSync('/opt/personal-assistant/.env') for DEEPSEEK_API_KEY — cross-project credential coupling, no permission check
audit_findings.remediation: Use local .env or process.env; add fs.statSync mode & 0o077 === 0 check if cross-project read required

audit_findings.finding: Hardcoded /opt/personal-assistant/.env path in _load_key() + bare except:pass swallows all errors
audit_findings.remediation: Same as H-001; prefer os.environ.get fallback; add specific exception handling
Use WANXIA_ROOT env var or relative path resolution via import.meta.url

audit_findings.finding: Playwright --no-sandbox weakens isolation; SOCIAL_PROXY_URL injected without scheme/IP validation — proxy injection vector
audit_findings.remediation: Validate proxy URL format (http/https/socks5 only, reject link-local/metadata IPs); conditionally enable --no-sandbox

audit_findings.finding: execAsync cwd from new URL().pathname instead of fileURLToPath() — defensive issue, low actual risk
audit_findings.remediation: Use fileURLToPath() already imported at line 18

audit_findings.finding: PNG attachment unbounded when PIL missing (2.3MB/file × 8 = 18MB raw, ~24MB base64) — SMTP timeout/OOM risk
audit_findings.remediation: Add MAX_ATTACHMENT_BYTES = 5MB cap; skip oversized files with warning

audit_findings.finding: res.text() on weibo desktop HTML unbounded — large page OOM risk
audit_findings.remediation: Cap response body at 2MB via ReadableStream + AbortController

audit_findings.finding: Duplicate .env loading (server.js:6-14 + env.js:22-45) with silent override — acknowledged WANXIA-DEAD-01 structural debt
audit_findings.remediation: Remove server.js:6-14 redundant loader; keep env.js single entry point

audit_findings.finding: classify() failure returns is_sunset=False silently — API errors counted as negative samples, corrupting correlation stats
audit_findings.remediation: Add error:true field to failed results; exclude from aggregation; log specific exception type to stderr

audit_findings.finding: writeFileSync to /tmp/social_analysis.json non-atomic + world-readable — crash leaves corrupt JSON, data leak
audit_findings.remediation: tempfile + rename atomic write; output to project data/ dir; chmod 0600

audit_findings.finding: Silent discard of small images (<5KB) without logging; writeFileSync non-atomic
audit_findings.remediation: console.warn on discard; tempfile + rename for atomic write

audit_findings.finding: posts.json writeFileSync non-atomic — cron crash leaves corrupt JSON breaking downstream consumers
Empty catch {} blocks swallow errors silently across multiple files (also env.js:43, generate-content.js:37)
audit_findings.remediation: Add console.debug at minimum; critical paths upgrade to warn/error

audit_findings.finding: Stale /opt/wanxia absolute paths same pattern as H-003
SPOTS/COLOR_VARIANTS hardcoded city landmarks + copy variants — new city requires source change
audit_findings.remediation: Extract to spots.json + color-variants.json config files (structural debt SD-007)
